backendCrashed.title: Digivice engine stopped
backendCrashed.hint: Close the app and open it again. If the problem persists, contact the developer.

backend.title: Could not connect to Digivice
backend.hint: Make sure the application started correctly and try again.

emulator.title: Emulator not found
emulator.hint: Open Duckstation, load Digimon World 2003, and enable Export Memory Shared under Debugging.

config_missing.title: Emulator configuration missing
config_missing.hint: The app could not find EmulatorProcessName in the backend settings. Contact the developer.

process_not_found.title: Emulator not found
process_not_found.hint: Open Duckstation and load Digimon World 2003 before using the Digivice.

mapping_not_found.title: Memory export not available
mapping_not_found.hint: In Duckstation, open Debugging and enable Export Memory Shared, then reload the game.

connection_failed.title: Could not connect to Duckstation memory
connection_failed.hint: The app found Duckstation but failed to open the shared memory mapping. Check the technical detail below.

memory_read_failed.title: Failed to read emulator memory
memory_read_failed.hint: The connection was lost while reading game data. Check the technical detail below.

state_compose_failed.title: Failed to process game state
state_compose_failed.hint: The app connected to Duckstation but could not build the current game state. Check the technical detail below.
